title: arenaria horizontalis
intro: Arenaria horizontalis, also known as Creeping Sandwort, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Arenaria horizontalis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in topical applications for their medicinal properties.
